question: GTA 6 released before August 1, 2026?
resolution_criteria:
Resolution criteria

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Rockstar Games releases Grand Theft Auto VI (GTA 6) before August 1, 2026. The release date will be verified through official announcements from Rockstar Games or reputable gaming news outlets. If the game is released after the deadline or never released, the market will resolve to "No".

Background

Rockstar Games initially announced a release window for GTA 6 in Fall 2025. However, in May 2025, the company confirmed a delay, setting the new release date for May 26, 2026.
